response.overview: The story follows Alisha (Ummi Nazeera), a village girl who faces a serious test of love from her boyfriend, Amzar (Izzue Islam). Initially, their relationship is very good and harmonious because Alisha helps Amzar's family greatly while Amzar is seeking job opportunities as a lawyer. However, everything changes when Amzar passes his interview and is accepted to work as a lawyer at a law firm. Alisha and Amzar are extremely excited when Amzar's dream of becoming a lawyer comes true. Alisha buys Amzar various types of shirts so he feels comfortable at work. In his excitement, Amzar successfully handles his first case. The two of them celebrate Amzar's success at their favorite restaurant. Amzar also proposes to Alisha and Alisha accepts his proposal without hesitation, overjoyed. After they finish eating, heavy rain begins to fall. They quickly rush to Alisha's car and start heading home.
response.title: Patahnya Sebelah Sayap
